summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Series and Parallel Circuits is a key topic in DC Circuits for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of series and parallel circuits.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding series and parallel circuits has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
